title: Better Copper Equipment
description: This pack redesigns the copper armor and tools to look more unique and to be closer in color to the copper block and ingot textures.
body:
Copper is a unique block, so I figured it deserved some unique armor and tools.

This pack includes remodels/retextures of these items:
- Copper Armor model
- Copper Armor items textures
- Copper Tool item textures

![Overview of all the new textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ded80d6a9e53942d0532c2a93b7f2c852afae04.png)

![Requirements:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95bbb337722b07f2c1322c48d4862876f025cd72_0.webp)
